_comment: Claude Code project settings. Declares two plugins so agents working on this codebase auto-load the right skills: pbt-skills for the foundational property-based-testing patterns (anti-tautology, oracle naming, generators), and sqlproof-skills for sqlproof-specific patterns (RLS, RPC, stateful, CI setup). Copy this file into your own project's .claude/ directory to get the same auto-load when an agent works on your sqlproof-using project.
